Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Seal
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Respondent Michael DiSanto's motion to seal certain documents is granted. No opposition filed and good cause found per CRC 2.550(d). Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
